name: A2UI Agent Panel
description: An A2UI-inspired declarative surface contract purpose-built for agent-run status panels — panel/status/metric/timeline/action nodes only.
whenToUse: Reach for this variant when you're building agent-observability or run-status surfaces specifically, and want a narrower, purpose-fit vocabulary instead of a general-purpose form schema.
previewPrompts: Show me a status panel for the current deployment.
Give me a run summary with three timeline events and a retry action.
Show a panel with CPU and memory metrics for the worker fleet.
Show a status panel for a failed run with a retry action.
